description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a slim, rectangular display framed by a narrow bezel. The front surface is dominated by the dark, matte screen, while the rear panel features a subtle brand logo and a set of control buttons and ports. The monitor is supported by a curved, crescent-shaped stand that attaches centrally to the back, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The side views reveal the monitor's ultra-thin profile, with the screen and stand both exhibiting a sleek, minimalist design. The materials appear to be primarily matte black plastic with some metallic elements in the stand. Overall, the monitor exudes a professional and understated look suitable for office or home environments.
description: A slim, modern flat-screen computer monitor with a narrow bezel and a curved, crescent-shaped stand in matte black. The rear panel features a brand logo and control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, dark display area framed by a thin bezel and the curved stand visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the ultra-thin depth of the monitor and the arched stand extending backward for support.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brand logo, control buttons, and input/output ports, along with the full curvature of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the slimness of the monitor and the stand's attachment point.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and has a minimalist, flat profile with no visible texture or decorative elements. Corners are slightly rounded, maintaining a modern look.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a curved, crescent-shaped pedestal made of matte black material, attaching centrally to the rear of the monitor. It appears sturdy and non-adjustable.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the lower rear panel, grouped together in a horizontal row beneath the brand logo.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear panel, below the buttons; several ports are present but exact types and numbers are not clearly distinguishable.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is present on the upper center of the rear panel, featuring a geometric design and the text 'BEEMWARE' in a subtle, light color.
